box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; max-height: 240px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

p.font: Traverse the KG starting at the given variables

Check all connected equations. If there is at most one
unknown, free variable, then the equation can be applied
to find the value of the unknown variable

div.div: equation to variable: variable is unknown

p.span:
Calculate value of the unknown variable, flip the edges
to the remaining connected equations and check them
next.

div.div: Use the Equation to find the Value of the unknown variable

p.span:
The algorithm might find variable values, that are not
used to find the required variable.

Repeat until you checked all equations and did not
find any new variable values.

p.span:
Prune the graph to only contain nodes with a path to
the required variable(s).
